channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Florida AG to Newsmax: MLB may face religious bias inquiry
item.description: Florida Attorney General James Uthmeier said on Newsmax's "Finnerty" that his office is preparing to investigate Major League Baseball over potential religious bias.

item.title: Florida court says 18-year-olds have same gun rights as other adults
item.description: A Florida appeals court unanimously ruled that the state's ban on concealed carry for adults ages 18 to 20 violates the Second Amendment.

item.title: Oklahoma pastor quits House race after text scandal, Trump snub
item.description: One day after advancing to a Republican congressional runoff in Oklahoma, pastor Jackson Lahmeyer ended his campaign amid reports of illicit texts.

item.title: The proposed US-Iran framework warrants a closer look
